elements.name: Text
texts: AD 1411 - Pilgrimage of Laurence Rathold de Pasztho, a noble Hungarian. (Account of his adventures written in Dublin, 1412. He accompanied Mannini, but entered the Purgatory three days later, 11th November, 1411)
